title: Emre Kirac
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Emre Kirac
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
biography: I joined the faculty of the Joseph W. Luter, III School of Business at Christopher Newport University in August 2020. Prior to joining Christopher Newport University, I worked as an Assistant Professor in the Engineering Management Program at the University of Houston - Clear Lake between August 2016 and August 2020. I received a Ph.D. in Industrial Engineering from the University of Arkansas. I earned a Master's degree in Industrial and Systems Engineering from Colorado State University-Pueblo.
education_entries: Ph D in Industrial Engineering, University of Arkansas
MS in Industrial and Systems Engineering, Colorado State University
BS in Textile Engineering, Uludag University
research_interests: My primary research interests include the application of management science techniques to model and solve logistics planning problems arising in the humanitarian and supply chain sectors. I am also interested in applying simulation techniques to complex systems.
teaching_interests: My primary teaching areas include Business Statistics, Data Analytics, Software Applications for Business, Transportation Logistics, Management Science, Supply Chain Management, and Operations Management.
